notes: Roof terrace counts towards GFA if enclosed
Attic storey not counted if roof pitch ≥ 35°
Car porch limited to 1 storey and 2.4m height
Common wall must be maintained on the common boundary
Side extension requires mirror-image treatment if both units extend
Detached bungalow requires minimum 400 sqm plot
Side setbacks are 3m on both sides (wider than terrace/semi-d)
Minimum plot size: 1,400 sqm (no subdivision below 1,400 sqm)
Only Singapore Citizens may purchase GCB properties
Basement GFA excluded from plot ratio up to 50% of site area
Site coverage capped at 40% (stricter than standard bungalow)
URA may require further setbacks if adjacent to open space

cluster.max_gfa_formula: governed by approved strata title plan
notes: Strata-titled — land is common property of all unit owners
MCST manages and levies maintenance fees on common areas
Individual unit alterations require MCST approval
Collective sale requires 80–90% consent by share value (as per Land Titles (Strata) Act)
Façade must be conserved — any alteration to external walls requires URA Conservation Plan approval
Original architectural features (windows, doors, rooflines) must be retained where possible
Extensions to the rear may be permitted subject to Conservation Plan
Internal layout changes require URA QP submission
Demolition of main structure not permitted
